item.title: Lundahl SR501 Output Module
item.description: I put together an output module for my eurorack synth with some old Lundahl SR501 transformers from the late 60’s I had in my box of electronics scrap. It sounds pretty good and doubles as a distortion circuit if I overdrive it a bit. A tip for cheap DIY panels is using metersticks/yardsticks/tommestokk, cutting them to the right length and sanding them down, you end up with the measurements pretty much already on the back.

I’m an artist, musician, programmer and writer based in Oslo, Norway. I don’t believe in the concept of an “artistic resume”. I’ve got a masters degree in art, received grants and I’ve had shows in Norway and abroad.

Hi. My name is Magnus Holen Thurn, I’m an artist living in Norway. I decided to remove all documentation of my earlier work, as well as my CV, from the internet, so if you want any of those things you can send me an e-mail or write me a text. I’d rather not deal with social media, applications, grants, juries, etc. At the moment I am: Scaling my tools down to a laptop and a sketchbook.
